allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; npx playwright install chromium --with-deps 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("D:\\sitewithvids-main\\sitewithvids-main\\images\\3 Month pill.png"\); $rect = New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0, 42, 351, 101\); $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(351, 101\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,351,101\)\), $rect, [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Save\("D:\\sitewithvids-main\\sitewithvids-main\\images\\backpill 3.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); $src.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "saved")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $files = @\("ind-overview.png","ssmt-new.png","psp-new.png","true-opens-new.png","nwog-new.png","pdhl-new.png","sessions-hl.png","ote-levels-new.png","+1 cycle\\Digital Marketing Banner with Energetic Colors.jpg"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $p = Join-Path "D:\\sitewithvids-main\\sitewithvids-main\\images" $f; if \(Test-Path $p\) { $img = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($p\); $tl = $img.GetPixel\(2,2\); $tr = $img.GetPixel\($img.Width-3,2\); $bl = $img.GetPixel\(2,$img.Height-3\); $br = $img.GetPixel\($img.Width-3,$img.Height-3\); Write-Output \("{0} [{1}x{2}] TL:{3},{4},{5} TR:{6},{7},{8} BL:{9},{10},{11} BR:{12},{13},{14}" -f $f,$img.Width,$img.Height,$tl.R,$tl.G,$tl.B,$tr.R,$tr.G,$tr.B,$bl.R,$bl.G,$bl.B,$br.R,$br.G,$br.B\); $img.Dispose\(\) } else { Write-Output "$f MISSING" } })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $f = "images\\plus1-cycle-beige.png"; if \(Test-Path $f\) { $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(\(Resolve-Path $f\).Path\); "exists, {0}x{1}" -f $bmp.Width, $bmp.Height; $bmp.Dispose\(\) } else { "MISSING" })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; "ind-overview-beige.png","ssmt-new.png","psp-new.png","true-opens-new.png","nwog-new.png","pdhl-new.png","sessions-hl.png","ote-levels-new.png","plus1-cycle-beige.png" | ForEach-Object { $p = Join-Path "images" $_; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(\(Resolve-Path $p\).Path\); "{0}: {1}x{2}" -f $_, $bmp.Width, $bmp.Height; $bmp.Dispose\(\) })
